overall.description: A cowboy rides a horse through a foggy grassland in a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2). The third-person camera follows from behind as the character traverses tall grass and rocky outcrops in a misty morning atmosphere with cinematic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy prairie trail with scattered rock outcrops

events.description: flock of birds flies overhead through the foggy sky

agents.ego_description: riding horse at a steady trot through tall grass, approaching rock formations on the left

entered.detail: dense tall grass covering the ground in all directions
large rock formation emerging from the fog on the left side of the trail
low-lying desert scrub and yucca plants scattered in the grass
thick morning fog obscuring the sky and distant horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a cowboy on horseback riding through dense tall grass in a foggy prairie. Rock outcrops emerge from the mist on the left as the character rides forward, with birds flying overhead through the hazy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail curving around rock formations

events.description: path curves to the right as the character rides around the rock outcrop

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride along the winding trail, navigating around the rock formation on the left

entered.detail: large rock cliff face emerging from the fog on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character rides past the rock outcrop on the left as the trail curves right. A large cliff face emerges from the fog on the right side, growing larger as the character approaches. The rock outcrop on the left falls behind and disappears from view.

events.description: fog lifts slightly revealing expansive valley view ahead

agents.ego_description: riding alongside the cliff face on the right, descending slightly into the valley with the landscape opening up ahead

entered.detail: expansive view of the valley opening up through the lifting fog

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character riding along the cliff face on the right as the fog begins to lift, revealing an expansive valley view ahead. The trail descends slightly through the tall grass with distant mountains becoming visible through the haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy prairie that shifts from an open grassland to a narrow path flanked by towering rock formations. It begins with a third-person view of a cowboy on horseback riding through dense tall grass, while birds fly overhead through a hazy sky and rock outcrops emerge from the mist on the left. As the character rides forward, the trail curves to the right, causing the initial rock outcrops to fall behind and disappear from view. The scene then shifts as a massive cliff face emerges from the fog on the right, growing increasingly dominant in the frame as the rider approaches.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rugged cliffside that gradually opens into a vast, revealed valley. It begins with the character riding beside a steep rock face on the right as the dense fog starts to lift, unveiling an expansive vista ahead. As the trail descends slightly through swaying tall grass, the surrounding haze thins to expose the silhouettes of distant mountains. The scene finally expands into a wide panoramic view of the landscape as the morning light clarifies the horizon.
